info.name: Module3-WhatIf-AllScenarios-Combined
info.description: Module 3: All 4 What-If scenarios combined into one Postman collection

item.name: S1-BaseCase: Stable market, LTV65, 15% buffer, 0% drop
4. Add BufferLTV Model - defi_whatif_s1_basecase (col=3.85 ETH, buf=0.577 ETH, maxUsage=18%)
4. Add BufferLTV Model - defi_whatif_s2_stress (col=3.0 ETH, buf=4.0 ETH, maxUsage=18%)
4. Add BufferLTV Model - defi_whatif_s3_severecrash (col=3.19 ETH, buf=0.0 ETH, maxUsage=0%)
S4-Buffered: Same -50% crash, LTV75, 25% buffer (proof of concept)
4. Add BufferLTV Model - defi_whatif_s4_buffered (col=3.19 ETH, buf=0.798 ETH, maxUsage=25%)
